languages.original_text: "I struggle to trust a man whose life has been sustained for hundreds of years by unknown xenotechnology. Temper your exultation, Seneschal."

languages.text: "Я с трудом могу доверять человеку, жизнь в котором поддерживалась на протяжении сотен лет неизвестными ксенотехнологиями. Охладите свой восторг, сенешаль".
"I struggle to trust a man whose life has been sustained for hundreds of years by unknown xenotechnology. Temper your exultation, Seneschal."
languages.original_text: "Я с трудом могу доверять человеку, жизнь в котором поддерживалась на протяжении сотен лет неизвестными ксенотехнологиями. Охладите свой восторг, сенешаль".

traits.locale_text: "I struggle to trust a man whose life has been sustained for hundreds of years by unknown xenotechnology. Temper your exultation, Seneschal."
"I struggle to trust a man whose life has been sustained for hundreds of years by unknown xenotechnology. Temper your exultation, Seneschal."
"I struggle to trust a man whose life has been sustained for hundreds of years by unknown xenotechnology. Temper your exultation, Seneschal."

languages.text: 「何百年も未知の異種技術によって命を繋いでいる男に、私は信頼を寄せることができません。喜びを慎むこと、執事」
languages.original_text: "I struggle to trust a man whose life has been sustained for hundreds of years by unknown xenotechnology. Temper your exultation, Seneschal."

traits.locale_text: 「何百年も未知の異種技術によって命を繋いでいる男に、私は信頼を寄せることができません。喜びを慎むこと、執事。」

languages.text: « J'ai du mal à faire confiance à un homme dont la vie a été préservée pendant des centaines d'années par une xénotechnologie inconnue. Tempérez votre enthousiasme, sénéchal. »
languages.original_text: "I struggle to trust a man whose life has been sustained for hundreds of years by unknown xenotechnology. Temper your exultation, Seneschal."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai du mal à faire confiance à un homme dont la vie a été préservée pendant des centaines d'années par une xénotechnologie inconnue. Tempérez votre enthousiasme, sénéchal. »

languages.text: "Es fällt mir schwer, einem Mann zu vertrauen, der Hunderte von Jahren von einer unbekannten Xenotechnologie am Leben erhalten wurde. Also mäßigt Euren Jubel, Truchsess."
languages.original_text: "I struggle to trust a man whose life has been sustained for hundreds of years by unknown xenotechnology. Temper your exultation, Seneschal."

traits.locale_text: "Es fällt mir schwer, einem Mann zu vertrauen, der Hunderte von Jahren von einer unbekannten Xenotechnologie am Leben erhalten wurde. Also mäßigt Euren Jubel, Truchsess."

languages.text: "Hayatı yüzyıllardır bilinmeyen zeno teknolojisiyle sürdürülen bir adama güvenmekte zorlanıyorum. Coşkunuzu dizginleyin Seneşal."
languages.original_text: "I struggle to trust a man whose life has been sustained for hundreds of years by unknown xenotechnology. Temper your exultation, Seneschal."

traits.locale_text: "Hayatı yüzyıllardır bilinmeyen zeno teknolojisiyle sürdürülen bir adama güvenmekte zorlanıyorum. Coşkunuzu dizginleyin Seneşal."

languages.text: «Me cuesta confiar en un hombre que se ha mantenido con vida durante siglos mediante una xenotecnología cuya naturaleza desconocemos. Modere su júbilo, senescal».
languages.original_text: "I struggle to trust a man whose life has been sustained for hundreds of years by unknown xenotechnology. Temper your exultation, Seneschal."

traits.locale_text: «Me cuesta confiar en un hombre que se ha mantenido con vida durante siglos mediante una xenotecnología cuya naturaleza desconocemos. Modere su júbilo, senescal».

languages.text: “我实在难以信任一个靠未知异形科技维系生命数百年的人。克制下你的喜悦吧，总领。”
languages.original_text: "I struggle to trust a man whose life has been sustained for hundreds of years by unknown xenotechnology. Temper your exultation, Seneschal."

traits.locale_text: “我实在难以信任一个靠未知异形科技维系生命数百年的人。克制下你的喜悦吧，总领。”
